name: Trajectory Action
description: Wrap a JointTrajectory into a named Action, ready to feed into Cf_ActionChain. The name, tags + description live next to the trajectory that produced them, so they cannot drift out of sync.

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: Unique name for this action within the chain (e.g. 'approach', 'descend', 'retract').

inputParameters.name: trajectory
inputParameters.description: JointTrajectory output of a planner (Plan Motion / Plan Cartesian Motion).

inputParameters.name: tags
inputParameters.description: Optional comma-separated tags driving differentiated downstream execution (e.g. 'approach, linear'). Stored on the action's attributes.
